title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your application preferences and alerts.

sightingAlerts.title: Found Item Alerts
sightingAlerts.description: Get notified when potential matches are found

allowMessages.title: Who can message you
allowMessages.description: Control who is allowed to send you messages
allowMessages.everyoneDesc: Any user can send you a message
allowMessages.reportsOnlyDesc: Only users linked to your lost or found reports
allowMessages.nobodyDesc: No one can send you messages

loginPrompt.title: More Settings Available
loginPrompt.description: For more settings like notifications and alerts, please log in to your account.
